Investors are watching pension fund allocation changes for future market direction.

topStories.title: Vietnam raises $116 million in government bond auction
topStories.summary: Vietnam's State Treasury successfully raised three trillion dong in its recent bond auction.  This amount represents an increase from the previous week's successful bond sales.  The treasury sold a portion of its five-year and ten-year bonds on offer.  Additionally, some fifteen-year and thirty-year bonds were sold while three-year bonds saw no sales.  The government continues its efforts to meet its annual bond sale target.

Hong Kong equities outperformed mainland markets, supported by major technology companies. European investors maintain strong interest in Chinese equities, focusing on localization efforts.
